name: bud
description: Create a new oracle (bud from parent)

cli.help:
maw bud <name> [--from <oracle>] [--root] [--blank] [--org <org>] [--repo org/repo] [--issue N] [--note <text>] [--fast] [--split] [--dry-run]
       maw bud <name> --tiny --parent <oracle> [--cron <schedule>]  (nested leaf oracle inside parent's vault)
       NOTE: <name> is the STEM. The repo is created as <name>-oracle. Don't include '-oracle' in <name> or you get '<name>-oracle-oracle'.
       e.g. 'maw bud fusion' → repo 'fusion-oracle'. 'maw bud fusion-oracle' → repo 'fusion-oracle-oracle' ✗
